---
title: "Paxton Schroeder"
image: resources/Headshot.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/PaxtonSchroeder
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/paxton-schroeder
    - icon: inboxes
      text: Contact
      href: mailto:pjs014@uark.edu
---

I am a driven Industrial Engineering & Operations Analytics student at the University of Arkansas. I am working on research with the Department of Industrial Engineering and as a teaching assistant for Intro to Industrial Engineering and Probability & Stochastic Processes. Having previously coauthored two publications with the Electrical Engineering Department, I learned to utilize novel 3D printing techniques to create complex geometries out of metal. After I complete my undergraduate degree, I plan to attend graduate school and work in consulting or operations research.
